sql_overrides.sql_query:
SELECT  
 /*+ use_hash(JEG_MV_COST_PA,JEG_MV_COST_XLA) parallel(JEG_MV_COST_PA, 4) NOLOGGING*/
  distinct
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.creation_date_dl,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.created_by_dl,
  decode(JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code,    'B',    'G',    JEG_MV_COST_PA.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  DECODE(JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function,'ST',SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.quantity)) AS HOURS,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.program_update_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.pa_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal as gl_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal as recvr_gl_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.reversed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.task_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_currency_code,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS'  THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.denom_burdened_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_burdened_cost,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.work_type_id,
  apps.jeg_get_gl_period(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  apps.jeg_get_pa_period(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id)  recvr_pa_period_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_item_date,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.expenditure_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
JEG_MV_COST_PA.NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.incurred_by_organization_id,
  0 as entered_by,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.vendor_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.period_set_name,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.period_set_name,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND
    JEG_MV_COST_PA.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(null,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class, 
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.wip_resource_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type,
  
  0 AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  
  CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN  SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.amount) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  
  0 AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  
  CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN
  SIGN(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_burdened_cost, JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_burdened_cost)) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
  
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.raw_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost_rate,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.transaction_source,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,
  0 as denom_raw_cost,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_hold_flag,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.dr_code_combination_id||JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num = MIN(JEG_MV_COST_PA.dr_code_combination_id||JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num) OVER( PARTITION BY JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1, JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1 ORDER BY JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num RANGE UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.burden_cost ELSE 0 END) AS BURDEN_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_ic_processed_code,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.bill_job_billing_title,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute2,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute5,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.JEG_GET_CLASS_FUN,
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM,
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE,
  null as po_num,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.gl_code_segment3) gl_code_segment3,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute3) peia_attribute3,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.func_currency_code as func_currency_code,
CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (sign(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr, 0) - nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr, 0))  * ABS(JEG_MV_COST_PA.ACCT_BURDENED_COST)) ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) END AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS FUNC_RAW_COST,
  JEG_MV_COST_PA.customer_id,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' as source_type,
  JEG_MV_COST_XLA.ae_header_id,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
0 AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(apps.jeg_get_corporate_rate(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_PA.projfunc_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(apps.jeg_get_corporate_rate(JEG_MV_COST_PA.acct_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_PA.project_currency_code,JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_date_xal),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '__ STAFF WS' THEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE,
   non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('01'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB1_Hours  -- Classfication Hours P
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('02'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB2_Hours  -- Classfication Hours R
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('03'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB3_Hours  -- Classfication Hours W
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('04'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB4_Hours  -- Classfication Hours C
  ,apps.jeg_pa_nonb_hours(JEG_MV_COST_PA.peia_attribute8,apps.jeg_nonbillable_code('05'),SIGN((NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_Dr,0) - NVL(JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounted_cr,0))),JEG_MV_COST_PA.org_id,JEG_MV_COST_PA.billable_flag) AS NB5_Hours  -- Classfication Hours X
  
  ,CASE WHEN JEG_MV_COST_PA.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
  OR JEG_MV_COST_PA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_CORRECTION_DATE AS X_CORRECTION_DATE 
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,JEG_MV_COST_PA.X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE AS X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE

FROM JEG_MV_COST_PA JEG_MV_COST_PA,
     JEG_MV_COST_XLA JEG_MV_COST_XLA
where JEG_MV_COST_PA.EID = JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_1
  AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_num = JEG_MV_COST_XLA.source_distribution_id_num_2
  and JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type=JEG_MV_COST_XLA.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_TYPE
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.APPLICATION_ID=275--Today
  AND JEG_MV_COST_XLA.accounting_class_code IN ('COST','PROVIDER_COST','RECEIVER_COST')--today
  AND JEG_MV_COST_PA.system_linkage_function in('PJ','ST')--Today VI,USG
and JEG_MV_COST_PA.line_type='D'

-- LABOR DATA 'R' RAW LINES
SELECT
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.creation_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.created_by,
  decode(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code,'B','G', pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.transfer_status_code) transfer_status_code,
  0 as quantity,
pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.billable_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.program_update_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_date,
  --(CASE WHEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'C' THEN   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.cr_code_combination_id  ELSE   pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.dr_code_combination_id END) dr_code_combination_id,
  dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id dr_code_combination_id,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_gl_date,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.gl_date) recvr_gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date as gl_date,
  xal.accounting_date as recvr_gl_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.reversed_flag,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.task_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_currency_code,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS'  THEN pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.denom_raw_cost ELSE (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) END) as denom_raw_cost,
  0 AS DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_currency_code,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_exchange_rate,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.work_type_id,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_gl_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.gl_period_name) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --xah.period_name,
  jeg_get_gl_period (nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id) recvr_gl_period_name,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.recvr_pa_period_name,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_period_name) recvr_pa_period_name,
  jeg_get_pa_period (nvl(xal.accounting_date,xah.accounting_date),pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.org_id)  recvr_pa_period_name,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_type,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_cost_rate_date,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.projfunc_currency_code,
  peia.expenditure_item_date,
  peia.expenditure_type,
  nvl(peia.override_to_organization_id, pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id) expenditure_organization_id,
  peia.job_id,
  peia.system_linkage_function,
  --  peia.inventory_item_id,
  NULL AS INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
  --  DECODE(peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE, NULL,PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE,peia.UNIT_OF_MEASURE)  unit_of_measure,
  (CASE  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'ST' THEN 'HOURS'
  WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'USAGE HOURS'
  WHEN PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE = 'MILEAGE' THEN 'MILEAGE'
 WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'VI' THEN 'DOLLARS'
  ELSE PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.UNIT_OF_MEASURE
  END) NEW_UNIT_OF_MEASURE,
  --pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id,
  NVL(incurred_by.attribute9,0) as INCURRED_BY_HR_ID,
  pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_organization_id,
  --pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id,
  --entered_by.attribute9 as ENTERED_BY_HR_ID
  0 as entered_by,
  pa_expenditures_all.vendor_id,
  pa_implementations_all.period_set_name,
  gl_ledgers.period_set_name,
  --  pa_project_assignments.project_role_id,
  NULL AS PROJECT_ROLE_ID,
  null resource_organization_id,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  (CASE
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('ER','PJ','BTC') THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function IN ('OT','ST') THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'INV' THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'MATERIAL_ITEMS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND NVL(LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE,'NA') <> 'RATE' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND
    PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG='Y' THEN 'PEOPLE'
    WHEN peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION = 'VI' AND
    peia.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IS NULL AND LT.ORDER_TYPE_LOOKUP_CODE = 'RATE' AND PA_IMPLEMENTATIONS_ALL.XFACE_CWK_TIMECARDS_FLAG = 'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
   WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  2 THEN 'PEOPLE'
   WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE =  1 THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'WIP' AND NVL(BOM_RESOURCES.RESOURCE_TYPE,0) NOT IN (1,2) THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG =  'N' THEN 'FINANCIAL_ELEMENTS'
    WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' AND NVL(PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.EQUIPMENT_RESOURCE_FLAG,'Y') =  'Y' THEN 'EQUIPMENT'
     ELSE ' '
   END) resource_class, 
  peia.wip_resource_id,
  pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type,
  CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.amount) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  --(CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJFUNC_COST_EXCHANGE_RATE,1) AS PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN
  SIGN(NVL(XAL.accounted_dr, 0) - NVL(XAL.accounted_cr, 0)) * ABS(NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_raw_cost, peia.project_raw_cost)) ELSE ((CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1)) END AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  --(CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) * NVL(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_EXCHANGE_RATE,1) AS PROJECT_RAW_COST,
  --nvl(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.DENOM_BURDENED_COST)  project_burdened_cost,
  0 AS PROJECT_BURDENED_COST,
  peia.raw_cost_rate,
  peia.burden_cost_rate,
  peia.bill_job_id,
  peia.transaction_source,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE_CLASS_CODE,
  '0' AS X_CUSTOM,
  peia.attribute8,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) as denom_raw_cost,
  peia.cost_burden_distributed_flag,
  peia.bill_hold_flag,
  0 AS BURDEN_COST,
  peia.cost_dist_rejection_code,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_code,
  peia.cc_ic_processed_code,
  peia.bill_job_billing_title,
  peia.attribute2,
  peia.attribute5,
  peia.cc_cross_charge_type,
  JEG_GET_CLASS (pa_projects_all.PROJECT_ID, 'Controlling Performance Unit','C'),
  --api.invoice_num,
  NULL AS INVOICE_NUM,
  --api.invoice_date,
  NULL AS INVOICE_DATE,
  --poh.segment1 as po_num,
  NULL as po_num,
  peia.non_labor_resource,
  TRIM(dr_gl_code_combinations.segment3),
  peia.cc_prvdr_organization_id,
  peia.cc_recvr_organization_id,
  TRIM(peia.attribute3),
gl_ledgers.currency_code as func_currency_code,
  0 AS FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) AS FUNC_RAW_COST,
  pa_tasks.customer_id,
  xal.ae_line_num,
  'LABOR_COST' as source_type,
  xal.ae_header_id,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS WORKSHARE_FLAG,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.entered_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.entered_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.entered_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_DENOM_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_DENOM_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) AS PRDR_FUNC_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.projfunc_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_RAW_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN (CASE WHEN nvl(xal.accounted_dr,0) <> 0 THEN xal.accounted_dr ELSE -(nvl(xal.accounted_cr,0)) END) ELSE 0 END) * NVL(jeg_get_corporate_rate (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.acct_currency_code,pa_projects_all.project_currency_code,xal.accounting_date),0) AS PRDR_PROJ_RAW_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_FUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJFUNC_BURDENED_COST,
  0 AS PRDR_PROJ_BURDENED_COST,
  (CASE WHEN PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE like '__ STAFF WS' THEN PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL.ACCT_CURRENCY_CODE ELSE NULL END) AS PRDR_ACCT_CURR_CODE,
  NULL AS non_billable_code1 -- Classfication code P
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code2 -- Classfication code R
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code3 -- Classfication code W
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code4 -- Classfication code C
  ,NULL AS non_billable_code5 -- Classfication code X
  ,0 AS NB1_Hours  -- Classfication Hours P
  ,0 AS NB2_Hours  -- Classfication Hours R
  ,0 AS NB3_Hours  -- Classfication Hours W
  ,0 AS NB4_Hours  -- Classfication Hours C
  ,0 AS NB5_Hours  -- Classfication Hours X
   ,CASE WHEN FND_USER.USER_NAME = 'CONVERSION' 
  OR PEIA.TRANSACTION_SOURCE LIKE '%CONVERSION%'
  OR PEIA.EXPENDITURE_TYPE LIKE 'Conv-%'
  OR PEIA.BILL_GROUP LIKE 'CH2M-CONVERSION%' THEN 'CONVERSION' ELSE NULL END AS X_CONVERSION_NAME
  ,PAAF.ASS_ATTRIBUTE3 AS X_ASSIGNED_PU_ID
  ,peia.ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE AS X_ORIG_TRANS_REFERENCE
  ,CASE
      WHEN INSTR ( peia.attribute8, 'JMC LC') > 1
         THEN NEXT_DAY (pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.pa_Date - 1, 'FRIDAY')
      END as X_CORRECTION_DATE 
,case when xah.gl_transfer_status_code ='Y' THEN xah.gl_transfer_Date  END AS X_GL_TRANSFER_DATE
,pa_expenditures_all.EXPENDITURE_ENDING_DATE as X_EXPENDITURE_END_DATE
FROM pa_cost_distribution_lines_all ,
  pa_expenditure_items_all peia,
pa_expenditures_all ,
  pa_implementations_all ,
  gl_ledgers ,
  apps.pa_lookups ,
  pa_projects_all ,
  PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL ,
  PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES ,
  -- PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS,
  PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES ,
  BOM_RESOURCES ,
  PO_LINES_ALL   POL,
  PO_LINE_TYPES_B   LT,
  -- gl_code_combinations cr_gl_code_combinations,
  gl_code_combinations  dr_gl_code_combinations,
  --ap_invoice_distributions_all apid,
  --po_distributions_all pd,
  --po_headers_all poh,
  --ap_invoices_all api,
  per_all_people_f  incurred_by,
  --per_all_people_f entered_by
  pa_tasks ,
  xla_distribution_links  xdl,
  xla_ae_headers  xah,
  xla_ae_lines  xal,
  FND_USER 
  ,PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_F  PAAF
WHERE 


1=1
AND

peia.EXPENDITURE_TYPE = PA_EXPENDITURE_TYPES.EXPENDITURE_TYPE
AND FND_USER.USER_ID(+) = peia.CREATED_BY
  AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id
  AND peia.expenditure_id = pa_expenditures_all.expenditure_id
  --AND (select decode(peia.transaction_source,'IC Elimination',c.cr_code_combination_id, c.dr_code_combination_id) from PA_COST_DISTRIBUTION_LINES_ALL c
  --where expenditure_item_id = peia.expenditure_item_id and line_type = DECODE(peia.SYSTEM_LINKAGE_FUNCTION,'VI','R', 'PJ','R', DECODE(peia.expenditure_type,'India Elimination','R',DECODE(INSTR(peia.expenditure_type,'ICWHREI'),1,'R','D'))) and reversed_flag is null and line_num_reversed is null) = dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id
  AND pa_projects_all.project_id = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.project_id
  AND pa_lookups.lookup_code (+)= pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type
  AND pa_lookups.lookup_type (+)= 'COST DISTRIBUTION LINE TYPE'
  AND pa_implementations_all.org_id = pa_projects_all.org_id
  AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.PROJECT_TYPE
  AND PA_PROJECTS_ALL.ORG_ID = PA_PROJECT_TYPES_ALL.ORG_ID
  --AND peia.assignment_id = PA_PROJECT_ASSIGNMENTS.assignment_id (+)
  AND peia.non_labor_resource = PA_NON_LABOR_RESOURCES.non_labor_resource (+)
  AND peia.wip_resource_id = BOM_RESOURCES.resource_id (+)
  AND peia.PO_LINE_ID  = POL.PO_LINE_ID     (+)     -- PC:  do these join by a different criteria? 
  AND POL.LINE_TYPE_ID = LT.LINE_TYPE_ID (+)
  --AND TO_NUMBER(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.system_reference2) = apid.invoice_id(+)
  --AND TO_NUMBER(pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.system_reference3) = apid.distribution_line_number(+)
  --AND APID.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID = PD.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID(+)
  --AND PD.PO_HEADER_ID = POH.PO_HEADER_ID(+)
  --AND APID.INVOICE_ID = API.INVOICE_ID(+)
  AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_type = 'R' -- Raw Cost
   AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = PAAF.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(PAAF.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(PAAF.effective_start_date (+))
  --(CASE WHEN peia.system_linkage_function = 'USG' THEN 'R' WHEN (peia.system_linkage_function NOT IN ('VI','USG') and xah.event_type_code IN ('LABOR_COST_DIST','LABOR_COST_DIST_ADJ','xxUSG_COST_DIST')) THEN 'R' ELSE 'D' END)
  --AND peia.TRANSACTION_SOURCE <> 'IC Elimination'  -- REMOVED from R12
  AND pa_expenditures_all.incurred_by_person_id = incurred_by.person_id (+)
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) <= trunc(incurred_by.effective_end_date (+))
  AND trunc(pa_expenditures_all.creation_date) >= trunc(incurred_by.effective_start_date (+))
  --AND pa_expenditures_all.entered_by_person_id = entered_by.person_id (+)
  AND peia.task_id = pa_tasks.task_id (+)
AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_1
  AND pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.line_num = xdl.source_distribution_id_num_2
  AND xal.ae_header_id = xah.ae_header_id -- changed from xdl to xal
  AND xah.gl_transfer_status_code = 'Y'
  AND xah.accounting_entry_status_code = 'F'
  AND xal.ae_header_id = xdl.ae_header_id -- changed reverse the join
    and xdl.application_id=XAL.application_id
  and XAL.application_id=XAH.application_id
  and XAH.application_id=275
  AND xdl.ae_line_num = xal.ae_line_num
  AND xal.accounting_class_code IN ('COST','PROVIDER_COST','RECEIVER_COST')
  AND peia.system_linkage_function not in('VI','USG')
    AND xal.ledger_id = gl_ledgers.ledger_id
  AND gl_ledgers.PERIOD_SET_NAME = 'JEG_STD_CAL' --SS
  AND gl_ledgers.ledger_category_code = 'PRIMARY'
  --AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = 57064
  --AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = xal.code_combination_id --- giving good result
  AND dr_gl_code_combinations.code_combination_id = (SELECT NVL((xal2.code_combination_id),-1) FROM xla_distribution_links xdl2, xla_ae_lines xal2
																					   
  WHERE xdl2.source_distribution_id_num_1 = pa_cost_distribution_lines_all.expenditure_item_id
  AND xdl2.ae_header_id = xal2.ae_header_id
  AND xdl2.ae_line_num = xal2.ae_line_num
								  
											
										
  AND xdl2.source_distribution_type = 'D' AND ROWNUM = 1)
  AND xal.currency_code <> 'STAT'
   AND XAL.ACCOUNTING_DATE >= to_date('10/01/2016', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
 AND (XAH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE >=  to_date('$$MV_LAST_EXTRACT_DATE', 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')

 )
